mapper.select: SELECT a.id, a.phone, a.name, a.id_type, a.id_no, a.sex, a.is_id_auth, a.nation, a.birthday, a.id_startdate, a.id_enddate, a.id_department, a.address, a.employer, a.open_id, a.wx_number, a.qq_number, a.occupation, a.education, a.hobby, a.email, a.emer_contact, a.emer_phone, a.org_id, a.company_id, a.seq, a.head_photo, a.front_photo, a.back_photo, a.create_time FROM pr_user a WHERE a.company_id = #{companyId} AND a.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY a.create_time DESC

SELECT a.id, a.phone, a.name, a.id_type, a.id_no, a.sex, a.is_id_auth, a.nation, a.birthday, a.id_startdate, a.id_enddate, a.id_department, a.address, a.employer, a.open_id, a.wx_number, a.qq_number, a.occupation, a.education, a.hobby, a.email, a.emer_contact, a.emer_phone, a.org_id, a.company_id, a.seq, a.head_photo, a.front_photo, a.back_photo, a.create_time, b.room_num, c.org_name FROM pr_user a LEFT JOIN pr_user_house uh ON uh.user_id = a.id AND uh.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN pr_house b ON b.id = uh.house_id LEFT JOIN sys_organization c ON c.org_id = a.org_id WHERE a.id = #{userId}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM pr_user_house WHERE house_id = #{houseId} AND is_deleted = 0

SELECT id, phone, name, id_type, id_no, sex, is_id_auth, nation, birthday, id_startdate, id_enddate, id_department, address, employer, open_id, wx_number, qq_number, occupation, education, hobby, email, emer_contact, emer_phone, org_id, company_id, seq, head_photo, front_photo, back_photo, create_time FROM pr_user WHERE phone = #{phone} AND is_deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
